examples: Barny was the man with whom Leif discussed his plan to sail further west.
The son of Eric the Red, named Leif Ericson, had heard rumors about land west of Greenland.
Leif Ericson and his men were the first Europeans to walk on the shores of North America, almost 500 years earlier than Columbus.
Leif Johansson, former chief executive of Volvo, will succeed Mr Schweitzer on 1 June.
Leif Trogen runs the Swedish Banker's Association which also operates the clearing system there.
